recovered.criteria: has R2 derivatives (derivatives/{id}/ exists in R2 with thumb file)
recovered.disposition: safe to repair - thumb_url needs updating from dead images.wildphotography.com CDN to R2 paths

potentially_recoverable.criteria: has original_source_path pointing to /Volumes/ADATA SC740/ Smugmug Backup on disk; files exist but no R2 derivatives generated
potentially_recoverable.disposition: need re-import workflow to upload originals to R2 and generate derivatives

unrecoverable.criteria: no original_r2_key AND no original_source_path AND no R2 derivatives (truly orphan - likely placeholder/reference entries with no actual photo assets)

notes: This batch (LIMIT 500 starting from lowest IDs) found 69 records with R2 derivatives that are recoverable with thumb_url fix. 252 records have original_source_path on disk and are potentially recoverable via re-import. 179 records are truly orphan with no source whatsoever - these are placeholder/reference entries (species names like 'scarlet-macaw', 'quetzal') that were created but never had actual photo assets uploaded. The full orphan pool has 182 truly orphan records out of 11,021 total.
